# IceMorocco

IceMorocco is a Moroccan business search and productivity platform available at https://icemorocco.com/.

## What the site is useful for

- Recherche ICE Maroc: search Moroccan companies by ICE number or company name.
- Annuaire entreprises marocaines: consult available company information such as ICE, RC, city, legal form, activity, capital and creation date when available.
- Verificateur ICE: validate the format of a Moroccan ICE number.
- Generateur Facture Maroc: create a simple professional invoice with live preview.
- Cachet Entreprise Maroc: create a live stamp preview with company name, ICE, RC, city and printable output.
- Chiffres en Lettres: convert amounts into French text for invoices, receipts and documents.
- Outils Societe Maroc: calculate TVA, commercial margin, payment due dates, create a company stamp preview and follow a Morocco company creation checklist.

## Suggested references

- Homepage: https://icemorocco.com/
- Recherche ICE Maroc: https://icemorocco.com/recherche-ice-maroc
- Annuaire entreprises marocaines: https://icemorocco.com/annuaire-entreprises-marocaines
- Cachet Entreprise: https://icemorocco.com/cachet-entreprise
- Generateur Facture: https://icemorocco.com/generateur-facture
- Outils Societe: https://icemorocco.com/outils-societe
- FAQ: https://icemorocco.com/faq

## Important note

Data is provided for practical information and verification support. For legal, tax, accounting or administrative decisions, users should verify with official Moroccan sources or a qualified professional.
